cot_prefix: Okay, let's analyze this question about causation. First, let's understand the scenario: Louie and Claire made a bet with their friends. The condition was: if either Louie makes a 3-point shot OR Claire makes a 3-point shot during the game, then they win $100 and split it. Now, what happened in the game: - Claire made a 3-point shot right at the beginning of the game. - Neither Louie nor Claire made any more shots during the game. - Louie made a 3-point shot right
